title: H&S Metal Herb Grinder – 4 Pieces – Fine Non-Sticky Grinder with Pollen Collector & Magnetic Lid – Aluminium Herb & Tobacco Grinder
features: Premium Material Build: Crafted from solid anodized aluminium alloy, this metal herb grinder ensures long-lasting performance and a sleek, stylish look for everyday use.
Effortless Grinding Action: Razor-sharp curved diamond teeth in this large grinder deliver smooth, consistent shredding for a fluffy texture with minimal effort.
Precision Hole Design: The dry herb grinder features perfectly sized holes that allow only evenly ground herbs to pass through—no chunks, just consistency.
Secure Magnetic Closure: Built-in powerful magnets keep the grinder metal lid tightly sealed to reduce spillage and protect contents when not in use.
Multi-Layer Functionality: This large herb grinder includes a micron mesh screen and pollen catcher, making it ideal for anyone looking for a durable stainless steel grinder alternative.
